query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: Translucent curtains hang before a window, backlit by cool light that traces vertical folds and creases through the fabric. Dark horizontal and vertical window bars cast a grid of shadows across the material. Deep shadows occupy the left and right portions of the frame, while brighter illumination concentrates along the curtain ridges in the center.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Translucent curtains hang before a window in an extremely underexposed, near-abstract composition where deep shadows consume most of the frame. Cool, desaturated light traces vertical folds through the fabric, while dark window bars cast a grid of shadows across the material. The muted blue-gray palette and severe underexposure create an oppressive, unsettling atmosphere that evokes dread through minimal visible detail and suffocating darkness.
